display.purpose: Project and page titles. Playfair Display 600, tracking-tight.

body.purpose: Essay prose; justified columns beside image sequences.

label.purpose: Uppercase navigation links; state shown by underline, not color flips.

caption.purpose: Subtitles, image captions, metadata in Caption Gray.

shadows.name: floating-panel
shadows.purpose: Dropdown menus and anything that overlays content while the page stays interactive.

motion.name: overlay-fade
motion.purpose: Protected-image scrim overlay fade on hover.

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Uppercase Playfair navigation link; darkens on hover, underlines when active.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.025em; color: #262626; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.15s ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #0a0a0a; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid #111111; outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Nav Link (Active)
components.description: Current-page state: ink black with a 4px-offset underline.
components.css: .ds-nav-link-active { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.025em; color: #111111; text-decoration: underline; text-underline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Wordmark
components.description: Site identity: bold, widest tracking in the system, with Caption Gray subtitle.
components.html: PATRICIO SALINAS APhotography, essays and visual thinking
components.css: .ds-wordmark { display: block; font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.25rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: #111111; text-decoration: none; } .ds-wordmark:hover { color: #262626; } .ds-wordmark-sub { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #4b5563; }

components.name: Language Pill
components.description: The system's one eccentric detail: italic label in a dashed 1px border.
components.html: <button class="ds-lang-pill">EN <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m6 9 6 6 6-6"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-lang-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-style: italic; font-size: 1rem; color: #262626; background: transparent; border: 1px dashed #374151; border-radius: 4px; padding: 4px 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.15s ease; } .ds-lang-pill:hover { color: #0a0a0a; } .ds-lang-pill:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid #111111; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Dropdown Panel
components.description: Floating white panel with hairline border; square corners, soft shadow.
components.html:
• Atacama
  • Walter Benjamin
components.css: .ds-dropdown { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; width: 192px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 4px 6px -4px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); } .ds-dropdown-item { display: block; font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #262626; text-decoration: none; padding: 8px 16px; transition: color 0.15s ease; } .ds-dropdown-item:hover { color: #0a0a0a; } .ds-dropdown-item-active { color: #111111; text-decoration: underline; text-underline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Lightbox Control
components.description: Circular scrim button with white icon; close/prev/next controls in the dark viewing room.
components.html: <button class="ds-lightbox-control" aria-label="Next image"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m9 18 6-6-6-6"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-lightbox-control { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.6); color: #ffffff; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-lightbox-control:hover { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.8); } .ds-lightbox-control:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ffffff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Image Caption
components.description: Caption Gray metadata text beneath or beside photographs.
components.css: .ds-caption { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.4; color: #4b5563; }

narrative.overview: The site is a finely-set book of photo-essays. Text and image are equals: a justified Playfair Display column sits beside the photographs the way an essay sits beside its plates. Every visual decision defers to black-and-white photography — the interface is monochrome ink on white paper so that the only tonality on any page comes from the work itself. The visitor should feel they are reading a publication, not browsing a website. Restraint here is literary, not corporate: a serif everywhere, justified prose, uppercase letterspaced wayfinding — the conventions of fine book design, not of SaaS.
keyCharacteristics: Monochrome ink-on-paper palette; photographs are the only source of tone
One serif family (Playfair Display, roman + italic) carries the entire voice
Refined and restrained components: typography does the signaling; chrome recedes
Essay layout: text column and image sequence side by side as equals

rules.name: The Monochrome Rule
rules.body: The interface is ink, paper, and gray. Photography is the only source of tone on any page. Introducing a UI accent color is prohibited without an explicit identity decision.

rules.name: The Dead Token Rule
rules.body: --color-gold (#d4af37) and Abril Fatface are defined in app.css but used nowhere. They are not part of this system. Never reach for them as 'the brand accent'; remove them when convenient.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Playfair Display (roman + italic) is the entire typographic voice. Adding a second family is prohibited without an identity decision; contrast comes from weight, case, tracking, and italics.

rules.name: The Typographic Signal Rule
rules.body: Interactive states are typographic: active pages are underlined (text-underline-offset: 4px), hover darkens charcoal to near-black, the current language is italic. No pills, badges, or color flips.

rules.name: The One Plane Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadow is a response to floating (dropdowns, lightbox), never a default card treatment.

dos: Do keep the interface strictly monochrome (#111111 ink, #ffffff paper, the gray ramp); let photographs provide all tone.
Do use Playfair Display for everything, with case, weight (400/600/700), tracking, and italics as the only contrast tools.
Do signal interaction typographically: underline at 4px offset for active, charcoal-to-black on hover, italic for language.
Do keep borders at 1px Hairline Gray and corners square (the language pill's 4px dash and the lightbox's circular controls are the only exceptions).
Do maintain Caption Gray (#4b5563) as the floor for text contrast on white; never lighter.
Do give every animation a prefers-reduced-motion alternative — the homepage loopers must pause to static strips.
donts: Don't use the dead tokens: no --color-gold (#d4af37) accents, no Abril Fatface. They are unused legacy and not part of the identity.
Don't drift toward 'stock photographer templates' — full-bleed hero slideshows, script logos, booking CTAs.
Don't add 'trendy agency portfolio' effects — WebGL, cursor followers, scroll-jacking; nothing may upstage the photographs.
Don't introduce 'commercial/e-commerce feel' — prices, carts, promotional badges anywhere near the work.
Don't slip into 'cold tech minimalism' — no sans-serif UI voice, no corporate gray-on-gray sterility; the restraint must stay literary.
Don't decorate with shadows, cards, or panels; depth only for things that genuinely float (dropdowns, lightbox).
Don't place text over photographs except inside the established scrim overlays.
